tasks.label: Run sistemagestaoagua
tasks.command: rm -rf /tmp/sistemagestaoagua-vscode-run && mkdir -p /tmp/sistemagestaoagua-vscode-run && javac -d /tmp/sistemagestaoagua-vscode-run -cp 'src:lib/ojdbc11.jar:lib/flatlaf-3.6.jar:lib/ikonli-core-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-swing-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-fontawesome5-pack-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-materialdesign2-pack-12.3.1.jar' $(find src -name '*.java') && java -cp '/tmp/sistemagestaoagua-vscode-run:lib/ojdbc11.jar:lib/flatlaf-3.6.jar:lib/ikonli-core-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-swing-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-fontawesome5-pack-12.3.1.jar:lib/ikonli-materialdesign2-pack-12.3.1.jar' App.Executable
